entries.summary: Completed Next.js 15 to 16 upgrade. Upgraded next@^16.2.4, eslint-config-next@^16.2.4, eslint@^9.39.4. Created eslint.config.mjs flat config. Build, type-check, lint, and 75 tests all pass with zero errors.
lessons_learned: Next.js 16 upgrade was smooth — Turbopack default works without config changes
eslint-config-next@16 requires eslint >=9 and flat config format (eslint.config.mjs)
New react-hooks v5 React Compiler rules (set-state-in-effect, purity, etc.) are strict — can be disabled during upgrade to avoid scope creep
eslint 9's flat config is a significant format change from .eslintrc.json — one-time migration cost
Build and type-check remain the most reliable indicators of upgrade success
